description:
Build the default issue-explorer experience for the beadwork dashboard.

This ticket should own the issue-browsing lane and stay out of worker-management internals.

Scope:
- implement the Issues/default tab with a ready-first filter
- support switching status/filter views for broader triage (`ready`, `open`, `in_progress`, `blocked`, `closed`, `deferred`, `all`)
- support breadcrumb drill-in/out across repo -> epic -> ticket and back out again
- add scope set / scope clear / engage flows from inside the explorer
- render enough issue detail to support drill-in decisions without leaving the TUI
- expose delegate/run launch intents through callbacks/hooks expected by the later clarify-modal ticket

Primary file lane:
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/tui/issue-explorer.ts`
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/tui/issue-detail.ts`
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/actions/issues.ts`
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/actions/scope.ts`
- issue-explorer-focused tests under `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/__tests__`

Acceptance criteria:
- Issues is the default dashboard tab
- ready is the default filter, but the explorer is not ready-only
- breadcrumb navigation and walk-back-out behavior work cleanly
- scope retargeting and scope clearing work from the TUI
- tests cover ready-first defaults, filter changes, breadcrumb transitions, and scope behavior

Parallel-safety note:
- after the scaffolding ticket lands, this ticket should be safe to run in parallel with the worker-manager lane because it should avoid worker orchestration files and keep `dashboard.ts` edits minimal.
title: Implement the issue explorer tab with breadcrumb and scope workflows
